properties.Name: Ballycastle Beach
properties.Informatio: Ballycastle Beach is a popular tourist destination located on the Causeway Coast Route on the Antrim Coast of Northern Ireland. Ballycastle Beach is approximately 1.2 kilometres in length and runs from the pier at Ballycastle Marina at the western end to
properties.Dogs_Allow: Must be under 'proper control' in the award area throughout the summer season
properties.Toilets: Located at tennis courts and are open between 10am and 6pm when the award flag is flying
properties.Car_Parkin: At the marina and on the Carrickmore Road

properties.Name: Benone Strand
properties.Informatio: Benone Beach stretches for over 7 miles from Downhill westwards to where it meets Magilligan Point at the mouth of Lough Foyle and forms part of one of Ireland's longest beaches. Benone Beach, a Blue Flag award winning beach, is popular throughout the ye
properties.Dogs_Allow: From May to September this beach has a dog free zone. Please see beach map for details of dog free and dog exercise areas and dog paths
properties.Toilets: Open 9.00 am-8.30 pm in July & August; 9.00 am-4.00 pm March, April, May, June & September. Closed from October to March
properties.Car_Parkin: Parking is available at the beach entrance, Benone Tourist Complex and zoned beach parking
properties.Lifeguard_: This beach is manned by RNLI lifeguards from April to September (weekends & public holidays). Daily service only in July & August 11.00 am-7.00 pm.

properties.Name: Castlerock Beach
properties.Informatio: Downhill Beach is located at the eastern end of a 7 mile long continuum of sand incorporating Benone Strand and Magilligan Point. Downhill Beach is located within the Binevenagh AONB, in the shadow of the iconic Mussenden Temple. This rural beach offers
properties.Dogs_Allow: From 1st May to 30th Sept restrictions for dogs apply to certain sections of this beach
properties.Toilets: Open daily during the season from Easter to end of September, closed during winter period (Toilets available at Castlerock promenade all year round, approx. 2 miles eastwards)
properties.Car_Parkin: Free parking is available on the beach all year round (beware of tides). Very limited no. of spaces available at entrance to beach beside toilet block, and approx 20 spaces available about 100m from beach entrance
properties.Lifeguard_: RNLI lifeguard service available daily (11am - 7pm) from June to September

properties.Name: Castlerock Beach
properties.Informatio: Castlerock Beach, falling within the Binevenagh AONB, is backed by an extensive dune system and the Barmouth estuary at its eastern extremity and basaltic cliffs and extensive promenade at its western end.
properties.Dogs_Allow: From 1st May to 30th Sept restrictions for dogs apply to certain sections of this beach
properties.Toilets: Located on the promenade adjacent to the beach entrance - open all year round.
properties.Car_Parkin: Free parking is available on the beach all year round - please note, cars prohibited from western end of beach, demarcated by wooden posts (beware of tides and, depending on weather conditions, water/soft sand at beach entrance). Approx 120 spaces availa
properties.Lifeguard_: RNLI lifeguard service available daily (11am - 7pm) from June to September

properties.Name: East Strand
properties.Informatio: East Strand Beach forms a continuum of sand, approx 2.5 miles long, merging into Curran Strand and Whiterocks at its eastern extremity. East Strand Beach is popular for watersports all year round, especially surfing. The beach is bounded by an impressive
properties.Dogs_Allow: From 1st May to 30th Sept restrictions for dogs apply to certain sections of this beach
properties.Toilets: Located to the rear of the Watersports Centre building adjacent to the beach - open all year round.
properties.Car_Parkin: Free parking (approx. 650 spaces - height restriction) is available in East Strand car park adjacent to the beach
properties.Lifeguard_: RNLI lifeguard service available daily (11am - 7pm) from June to September

properties.Name: West Strand
properties.Informatio: West Strand Beach, also known as West Bay or Millstrand is a popular resort beach in the heart of this busy seaside resort. West Strand Beach is bounded at its northern end by the busy habour and flanked along its eastern boundary by a well used pedestri
properties.Dogs_Allow: From 1st May to 30th Sept restrictions for dogs apply to certain sections of this beach. Dogs must be kept on lead at all times
properties.Toilets: Located at both ends of the promenade adjacent to the beach - seasonal opening applies
properties.Car_Parkin: Free parking (approx. 150 spaces - height restriction) is available in West Strand car park in close proximity to the beach.
properties.Lifeguard_: RNLI lifeguard service available daily (11am - 7pm) from June to September.

properties.Name: Portstewart Strand
properties.Informatio: Portstewart Strand Beach, owned and cared for by the National Trust, is one of Northern Ireland's finest and most popular beaches for all ages.
properties.Dogs_Allow: From 1st May to 30th Sept restrictions for dogs apply to certain sections of this beach. Dogs must be kept on lead at all times
properties.Toilets: Open during main season (March to September)
properties.Lifeguard_: RNLI lifeguard service available daily (11am - 7pm) from June to September.

properties.Name: Whiterocks
properties.Informatio: Whiterocks Beach, forming the eastern end of the East Strand/Curran Strand beach and within walking distance of the busy resort of Portrush, is famous for its white chalk cliffs. Whiterocks Beach is a very popular location for surfing and surf kayaking o
properties.Dogs_Allow: From 1st May to 30th Sept restrictions for dogs apply to certain sections of this beach. Dogs must be kept on lead at all times
properties.Toilets: Toilet block in lower main car park - seasonal opening
properties.Car_Parkin: Free parking (approx. 120 spaces - height restriction barrier at main car park) is available in the main car park adjacent to the beach, and a couple of overflow car parks situated within the dunes.
properties.Lifeguard_: RNLI lifeguard service available daily (11am - 7pm) from June to September.

properties.Name: Whitepark Bay
properties.Informatio: Half-moon shaped beach between two headlands on the North Antrim Coast. It is one of the first Neolithic settlements in Ireland and 3 passage tombs are sited on the surrounding hills. Bathing is not recommended due to strong currents.
properties.Dogs_Allow: Dogs must be kept under proper control
properties.Toilets: No Toilets - toilets can be found at towns Ballycastle and Bushmills
properties.Car_Parkin: Free parking in main visitor car park

properties.Name: Salmon Rock Beach
properties.Informatio: Portballintrae Beach, also known as Salmon Rock Beach, is a small sandy beach located in the heart of this seaside village. It consists mainly of a sandy area with a rocky shoreline at either end and enclosed by offshore rocks. Portballintrae Beach is ac
properties.Dogs_Allow: From 1st May to 30th Sept restrictions for dogs apply to certain sections of this beach.
properties.Toilets: Located at main car park adjacent to beach - open daily
properties.Car_Parkin: Free parking (approx. 100 spaces) is available in the main car park adjacent to the beach.

properties.Name: Waterfoot Beach
properties.Informatio: Waterfoot Beach is a popular tourist destination located on the Causeway Coastal Route on the eastern coast of Northern Ireland. Waterfoot Beach is approximately 1 km in length and comprised entirely of sand. The bathing area is backed by dunes which run
properties.Dogs_Allow: Dogs must be kept under proper control
properties.Car_Parkin: Located in the village of Waterfoot
